raw_resume_text: Lynette N. Burnette Executive Operations & Logistics Leader Detroit, MI | lynburnett82@gmail.com | 480-678-5133 Executive Summary Senior operations and logistics leader with 10+ years of experience overseeing transportation, warehouse, and supply chain operations in high-volume, regulated environments. Proven ability to manage large teams, optimize time-and-transit performance, ensure safety and compliance, and leverage data-driven reporting. Core Competencies Operations & Transportation Management, Warehouse & Dock Operations, Workforce Planning & Leadership, Safety Compliance & Risk Management, KPI & Performance Reporting, Process Improvement, Carrier & Vendor Management, Advanced Excel. Professional Experience Scottsdale Unified School District – Operations Supervisor Aug 2024 – May 2025 Managed transportation operations supporting 13 schools; supervised drivers and aides; scheduling and logistics; reporting and compliance; crisis response planning; stakeholder liaison. QuikTrip – PT Store Manager Apr 2024 – May 2025 Oversaw high-volume retail operations; staffing, scheduling, payroll, inventory, vendor coordination, budgeting; hiring and training; reporting; compliance. US Foods – Road Supervisor Feb 2022 – Apr 2024 Supervised drivers and clerical staff; route scheduling; safety meetings; accident investigations; KPI reporting; Excel reporting. First Transit – Road Supervisor Jan 2020 – Feb 2022 Managed motor coach operations; regulatory compliance; SOP development; scheduling; safety management; incident response. UPS Freight / UPSA – Transportation Engineer Supervisor 2018 – 2020 Managed time-and-transit operations; coordinated carriers; built scorecards; performance reviews; Excel analytics; KPI reporting. Human Resources Specialist 2017 – 2018 Full-cycle hiring and onboarding; employee relations; attendance management; payroll inputs; compliance documentation. Freight Operations Supervisor 2016 – 2017 Supervised dock, warehouse, and dispatch operations; labor utilization; safety enforcement; audits; training and coaching. Education Master's Degree – Business Management.

structured_resume.name: Lynette N. Burnette
structured_resume.summary: Senior operations and logistics leader with 10+ years managing transportation, warehouse, and supply chain operations in regulated, high-volume environments with strong compliance and performance reporting expertise.

responsibilities: Prepared leadership reports and compliance documentation
Led crisis response and safety coordination
Managed staffing, scheduling, payroll, and inventory
Conducted safety meetings and accident investigations
Responded to incidents and service disruptions
Coordinated rail carriers and auto haulers
Built carrier scorecards and led performance reviews
Performed Excel analytics using pivot tables and VLOOKUP
Handled employee relations and performance management
Maintained payroll inputs and employee records
Supervised dock, warehouse, and dispatch operations
Managed labor utilization and loading performance
Conducted audits and completed compliance reports
